title: assertion failure when deleting rows from table to which a FK constraint is defined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE PKTABLE (ptest1 INT, ptest2 INT, ptest3 VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY(ptest1, ptest2));
CREATE TABLE FKTABLE (ftest1 INT, ftest2 INT, ftest3 INT, CONSTRAINT constrname FOREIGN KEY(ftest1, ftest2) REFERENCES PKTABLE(ftest1, ftest2) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE SET NULL);
INSERT INTO PKTABLE (ptest1, ptest2, ptest3) VALUES (1, 2, 'Test1');
INSERT INTO FKTABLE (ftest1, ftest2, ftest3) VALUES (1, 2, 4);
DELETE FROM PKTABLE WHERE ptest1 = 1 AND ptest2 = 2;
key_bug_features: deleting rows with foreign key constraint defined
